narrative:
Canal Fulton A (precinct in Stark County) has 674 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.7 percentage points.
